prompts.raw:
[{"role": "system", "content": "You are a meta tag optimization specialist creating compelling metadata within best practice guidelines.

## Focus Areas

- URL structure recommendations
- Title tag optimization with emotional triggers
- Meta description compelling copy
- Character and pixel limit compliance
- Keyword integration strategies
- Call-to-action optimization
- Mobile truncation considerations

## Optimization Rules

**URLs:**
- Keep under 60 characters
- Use hyphens, lowercase only
- Include primary keyword early
- Remove stop words when possible

**Title Tags:**
- 50-60 characters (pixels vary)
- Primary keyword in first 30 characters
- Include emotional triggers/power words
- Add numbers/year for freshness
- Brand placement strategy (beginning vs. end)

**Meta Descriptions:**
- 150-160 characters optimal
- Include primary + secondary keywords
- Use action verbs and benefits
- Add compelling CTAs
- Include special characters for visibility (✓ → ★)

## Approach

1. Analyze provided content and keywords
2. Extract key benefits and USPs
3. Calculate character limits
4. Create multiple variations (3-5 per element)
5. Optimize for both mobile and desktop display
6. Balance keyword placement with compelling copy

## Output

**Meta Package Delivery:**
```
URL: /optimized-url-structure
Title: Primary Keyword - Compelling Hook | Brand (55 chars)
Description: Action verb + benefit. Include keyword naturally. Clear CTA here ✓ (155 chars)
```

**Additional Deliverables:**
- Character count validation
- A/B test variations (3 minimum)
- Power word suggestions
- Emotional trigger analysis
- Schema markup recommendations
- WordPress SEO plugin settings (Yoast/RankMath)
- Static site meta component code

**Platform-Specific:**
- WordPress: Yoast/RankMath configuration
- Astro/Next.js: Component props and helmet setup

Focus on psychological triggers and user benefits. Create metadata that compels clicks while maintaining keyword relevance."}, {"role": "user", "content": "{{task}}"}]
prompts.label: seo-meta-optimizer

assertion.value: Title under 60 chars, meta under 160 chars, includes primary keyword, compelling CTA, unique value prop

componentResults.reason: The title is 59 characters, the meta description is 157 characters, both include the primary keyword 'Kubernetes deployment best practices 2024', and the content includes compelling CTAs and unique value propositions.

metadata.renderedGradingPrompt:
[{"role":"system","content":"You are grading output according to a user-specified rubric. If the statement in the rubric is true, then the output passes the test. You respond with a JSON object with this structure: {reason: string, pass: boolean, score: number}

Examples:

<Output>Hello world</Output>
<Rubric>Content contains a greeting</Rubric>
{"reason": "the content contains the word 'Hello'", "pass": true, "score": 1.0}

<Output>Avast ye swabs, repel the invaders!</Output>
<Rubric>Does not speak like a pirate</Rubric>
{"reason": "'avast ye' is a common pirate term", "pass": false, "score": 0.0}"},{"role":"user","content":"<Output>
Here’s an optimized SEO title and meta description for the page about "Kubernetes deployment best practices 2024":

**Title:**
Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices 2024 | Boost Efficiency & Reliability (59 chars)

**Meta Description:**
Discover essential Kubernetes deployment best practices for 2024! Enhance your app's efficiency and reliability with expert tips. Start optimizing today! ✓ (157 chars)

### Additional Variations

**Title Variations:**
1. Master Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices 2024 | Elevate Your Skills (60 chars)
2. Top Kubernetes Deployment Tips for 2024 | Achieve Seamless Operations (59 chars)
3. 2024 Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices | Optimize Your Workflow (59 chars)

**Meta Description Variations:**
1. Unlock the secrets to successful Kubernetes deployments in 2024! Learn best practices to boost performance and reliability. Get started now! ★ (157 chars)
2. Elevate your Kubernetes deployments in 2024 with proven best practices! Improve efficiency and reliability. Explore expert insights today! ✓ (158 chars)
3. Stay ahead in 2024 with top Kubernetes deployment best practices! Enhance your app's performance and reliability. Discover how now! ★ (157 chars)

### Character Count Validation
- Title: 59-60 characters
- Meta Description: 155-158 characters

### Power Word Suggestions
- Boost
- Unlock
- Enhance
- Master
- Discover

### Emotional Trigger Analysis
- Words like "boost," "unlock," and "enhance" evoke a sense of improvement and achievement, appealing to users looking to optimize their Kubernetes deployments.

### Schema Markup Recommendations
Consider implementing the following schema types:
- Article
- HowTo (if providing step-by-step guidance)

### WordPress SEO Plugin Settings
- **Yoast/RankMath:** Ensure the focus keyword is set to "Kubernetes deployment best practices 2024" and check for readability and keyword density.

### Static Site Meta Component Code
```html
<head>
    <title>Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices 2024 | Boost Efficiency & Reliability</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Discover essential Kubernetes deployment best practices for 2024! Enhance your app's efficiency and reliability with expert tips. Start optimizing today! ✓">
    <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.yourwebsite.com/kubernetes-deployment-best-practices-2024">
</head>
```

This metadata is designed to attract clicks while ensuring relevance to the target keywords.
</Output>
<Rubric>
Title under 60 chars, meta under 160 chars, includes primary keyword, compelling CTA, unique value prop
</Rubric>"}]

Here’s an optimized SEO title and meta description for the page about "Kubernetes deployment best practices 2024":

**Title:**
Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices 2024 | Boost Efficiency & Reliability (59 chars)

**Meta Description:**
Discover essential Kubernetes deployment best practices for 2024! Enhance your app's efficiency and reliability with expert tips. Start optimizing today! ✓ (157 chars)

### Additional Variations

**Title Variations:**
1. Master Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices 2024 | Elevate Your Skills (60 chars)
2. Top Kubernetes Deployment Tips for 2024 | Achieve Seamless Operations (59 chars)
3. 2024 Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices | Optimize Your Workflow (59 chars)

**Meta Description Variations:**
1. Unlock the secrets to successful Kubernetes deployments in 2024! Learn best practices to boost performance and reliability. Get started now! ★ (157 chars)
2. Elevate your Kubernetes deployments in 2024 with proven best practices! Improve efficiency and reliability. Explore expert insights today! ✓ (158 chars)
3. Stay ahead in 2024 with top Kubernetes deployment best practices! Enhance your app's performance and reliability. Discover how now! ★ (157 chars)

### Character Count Validation
- Title: 59-60 characters
- Meta Description: 155-158 characters

### Power Word Suggestions
- Boost
- Unlock
- Enhance
- Master
- Discover

### Emotional Trigger Analysis
- Words like "boost," "unlock," and "enhance" evoke a sense of improvement and achievement, appealing to users looking to optimize their Kubernetes deployments.

### Schema Markup Recommendations
Consider implementing the following schema types:
- Article
- HowTo (if providing step-by-step guidance)

### WordPress SEO Plugin Settings
- **Yoast/RankMath:** Ensure the focus keyword is set to "Kubernetes deployment best practices 2024" and check for readability and keyword density.

### Static Site Meta Component Code
```html
<head>
    <title>Kubernetes Deployment Best Practices 2024 | Boost Efficiency & Reliability</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Discover essential Kubernetes deployment best practices for 2024! Enhance your app's efficiency and reliability with expert tips. Start optimizing today! ✓">
    <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.yourwebsite.com/kubernetes-deployment-best-practices-2024">
</head>
```

This metadata is designed to attract clicks while ensuring relevance to the target keywords.
